title: Trivy supply chain compromise (TeamPCP)
description: A malicious Trivy release was published, force-pushing 76 tags to steal credentials. Upgrade to 0.70.0 or later.

title: Remote code execution in OpenSSL
description: OpenSSL < 3.2.0 contains a heap buffer overflow. Upgrade to 3.2.0 immediately.

title: Prototype pollution in lodash
description: lodash < 4.17.21 allows prototype pollution via the defaultsDeep function.

title: XML External Entity (XXE) in requests library
description: requests < 2.32.0 is vulnerable to XXE attacks when parsing XML responses.

title: Denial of Service in zlib
description: zlib < 1.3.1 allows denial of service through crafted compressed data.
